title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Reset Password. They will receive an email with a reset link valid for 24 hours. If the email does not arrive, check the spam folder or contact support.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Account Settings > Danger Zone > Delete Account. This action is irreversible and all data will be removed within 30 days.

title: Billing and Subscriptions
content: Users can manage billing and subscription plans under Account Settings > Billing. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal. Invoices are sent monthly to the registered email address.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Two-factor authentication adds extra security. Enable it from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication using an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or via SMS.

title: Data Export
content: Users can export their data in JSON or CSV format from Account Settings > Privacy > Export Data. The export may take up to 48 hours and a download link will be sent via email.

title: Contacting Support
content: Support is available 24/7 via live chat at support.example.com or by emailing support@example.com. Response time is typically under 2 hours for urgent issues.

title: Changing Email Address
content: To change your email address go to Account Settings > Profile > Edit Email. A verification link will be sent to the new address. The change takes effect after clicking the link.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are available within 14 days of purchase if the product was not used. Contact support with your order ID. Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days.
